description_long: This is a stylized doll with a youthful, anime-inspired appearance, featuring long, voluminous white hair styled in twin tails with black hair accessories. The doll is dressed in a detailed military-style outfit, including a green camouflage uniform, tactical vest with pouches, black gloves, and matching boots. A dark cape drapes from the shoulders down to the calves, adding a dramatic flair to the ensemble. The face is characterized by large, expressive eyes with a slight blush on the cheeks and a small, neutral mouth. The overall build is compact and chibi-like, with exaggerated head and hair proportions relative to the body. The materials and finish suggest a soft, matte plastic or vinyl exterior, typical of collectible or display dolls.
description: Anime-style doll with long white twin tails, dressed in green camouflage military gear and a dark cape, featuring large expressive eyes and a compact, chibi build.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's detailed facial features, twin tails, tactical vest, and the full front of the camouflage outfit.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the twin tails, the thickness of the cape, and the layered tactical gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full length of the cape, the back of the twin tails, and the rear details of the uniform and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the hair, cape, and side pouches on the uniform.
attribute_clothing_style: Military-inspired outfit with green camouflage uniform, tactical vest with pouches, black gloves, matching boots, and a long dark cape, evoking modern tactical gear with anime influences.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms slightly out to the sides, legs straight and close together, head facing forward, and cape hanging down the back.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with large, open eyes, a small closed mouth, and a slight blush on the cheeks.
attribute_hair_style: Long, voluminous white hair styled in high twin tails with black hair accessories.
